coverage.purpose: OAuth2-based social account connection, content publishing, account discovery, media management, and basic analytics.
coverage.payload_policy: Endpoint request parameters and HTTP response bodies are represented as JSON Schema-like contracts. Field-selectable endpoints expose documented field values as enums. Reusable resource and error models live under each platform definitions object.
coverage.response_completeness: Covers all documented success envelopes and the documented/common error families for the endpoints included in this catalog. Vendor APIs may introduce additional error subcodes or headers without notice.

request_contracts.note: Platform APIs may add fields or change constraints by API version, app review status, account type, and enabled product.

auth.token_location: Authorization header or query/body where vendor requires it

common.schema_dialect: JSON Schema 2020-12 compatible fragments; nullable values use type arrays.
